title: euphorbia × tsimbazazae
intro: Euphorbia × tsimbazazae is a succulent plant, a hybrid between Euphorbia tirucalli and Euphorbia pseudoesula, characterized by its striking appearance and medicinal properties. The plant contains a milky latex that has been used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and wounds. The health benefits of Euphorbia × tsimbazazae include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to reduce pain and promote wound healing. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as infusions and decoctions, can be used to harness its medicinal properties, but caution is advised due to its potential toxicity.
